faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

A:    Hygia Institute of Pharmaceutical Education & Research is a well-known institution for B.Pharma, Pharm.D, M.Pharma, D.Pharma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Hygia Institute of Pharmaceutical Education & Research has course specializations in Pharmacy Practice, Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma. Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure here.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students are placed each year in all courses. 12 LPA is average package and the lowest is 6 LPA. The average salary is 8 LPA. Recruiting companies are Cipla, etc. 60% of students got internships on their merit in many companies. Sales executive, manager, and supervisor roles are offered mostly.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities and infrastructure available in course like labs, library, Wi-Fi, and smart classroom with AC. Mess and other facilities like sports are the best in our college, and also focus on sports. In college, all the facilities are the best for students, and also include biometric attendance.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Hygia- Shapes the future in the field of pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Around 87% of students got placed. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA-5 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Pathkind Labs, Winmedicare, and ECLAT Solutions. Around 92% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: One projector, one whiteboard, and one podium are available. Classrooms are well-equipped and space for sitting is available. Hostel is only available for girls. Good quality of food available in the mess and canteen, and proper basic requirements of medical is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfying because of faculty members and good placement in 2023.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered was 10 Lacs per annum, and the lowest was 3 Lacs. The average salary was 5-6 lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies are Mankind and Sun Pharma. The top roles offered by the companies in my course were managerial positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides all types of facilities for students, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a seminar hall, DLC labs, and many other types of extra facilities. The food quality is excellent, and a single student can get a meal for approximately 60 rupees. All sports games are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: All about the Pharmacy College.

review_content.Placements: As my senior told me, only 10 to 20% of students get placement in the college. The highest package was 5 lakh per annum, the lowest was 1.5 lakh per annum, and the average was about 2.5 lakh per annum. Companies like TATA, Apollo Medics, etc., participated in the placement drives. Most of the students got placements in industrial roles, while others pursued masters.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food quality was not that good when I started studying here, but it changed in my second year. My college has a sports area, but students generally don't play sports, nor does the college provide many sports except cricket. My college has all types of machines, equipment, and drugs used in the pharmacy field.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty members and teaching quality.

review_content.Placements: About 20% of students were placed. The highest package is of 4.5 L. p. a, the lowest package is of 2.5 L. p. a and average package is of 3.5 L. p. a. Top companies for recruitment are- cipla, abott, sun pharma. About 20% of students got internship in cipla, abott and many more local companies. Top roles offered are - drug inspector, hospital pharmacist, marketing executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the college for faculty members and for students also, labs are organised 4 days every week with proper procedure and requirements, classrooms are well maintained with proper lectures and seats are comfortable to do work, library is good with proper stocks of books and seats. The quality of food in mess is good and hygienic, medical facilities are also available in the college and there is a sports complex with proper facilities of games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is an extraordinary college for medical aspirants.

review_content.Placements: The highest package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Mankind, Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc. Almost every student gets an internship in companies. The roles offered are assistant pharmacist, etc., in hospitals and drug industries.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided for students are very helpful. We are provided with everything needed for our knowledge enhancement, and the infrastructure is very astonishing and helps us focus more on our studies. The library provides every book we need for our studies, and we can have those books for up to 1 semester.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jharkhand Rai University offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. Jharkhand Rai University courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Jharkhand Rai University courses stands around INR 60,000 to 5,20,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Jharkhand Rai University (JRU).

review_content.Placements: In our college, there are around 500 students in our batch. Recruiting companies for our course are Tata, Amazon, etc. All students got internships from our college. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 9 LPA - 11 LPA LPA. The average salary package offered in our course is around 6 LPA - 7 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our institute are not more. Our college provides students with many facilities. There is no Wi-Fi. Air-conditioned classrooms are not available. They give students many things like a library, labs, digital classrooms, etc. The quality of our hostel is good. The mess and canteen are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, college is good. Teachers and faculty members are so nice and supportive.

review_content.Placements: 50% of them are placed on campus, otherwise off campus. Package offered is between 2-12 LPA. Wipro, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, etc. are the top recruiters. Some other big companies and also banking institutions like ICICI, Axis and others are recruiting. Internships are mainly based on students preferences, like duration, stupend, paid or unpaid, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is good as per fee structure but not so cherished infrastructure. Hostel quality is what I didn't like; obviously, the food after a few months of admission but according to the fee, which is 80k and 1 lakh for 4 students and 2 students per year, that is fine .

faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law. To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear the All India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.
faqs.question: Q: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?

faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
faqs.question: Q: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?

review_summary.college_name: Jharkhand Rai University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college information and fee structure.

content.Placements: Placements are good, but 7th-semester students are not eligible for campus placements. Here, companies like TCS, Tech Mahindra, and others visit. Around 80-90% of students get placed every year. My plan is to be placed in a good company.
content.Infrastructure: My college provides us with a cafeteria, canteen, library, and many other facilities. Hostel timings are from 6:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Famous places around our university include Marasalli Hill and a few places, but there are not too many because our institute is located in a very outside area.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied with the college placements, but the infrastructure and facilities are really good.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is 50-60%. The highest package is 3.4 LPA and the lowest package is 1.2 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my college are Wipro. The student internship passing percentage is 65%, and the offered companies are Wipro. Software Developer and Application Learning and Development are the most common roles.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, canteen, library, and medical facilities are provided. The syllabus for the college placements is good, and the infrastructure and faculty of the Science department are also good. There are some issues with campus connectivity.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Jharkhand Rai University (JRU).

content.Placements: In our college, there are around 500 students in our batch. Recruiting companies for our course are Tata, Amazon, etc. All students got internships from our college. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 9 LPA - 11 LPA LPA. The average salary package offered in our course is around 6 LPA - 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our institute are not more. Our college provides students with many facilities. There is no Wi-Fi. Air-conditioned classrooms are not available. They give students many things like a library, labs, digital classrooms, etc. The quality of our hostel is good. The mess and canteen are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is good. Teachers and faculty members are so nice and supportive.

content.Placements: 50% of them are placed on campus, otherwise off campus. Package offered is between 2-12 LPA. Wipro, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, etc. are the top recruiters. Some other big companies and also banking institutions like ICICI, Axis and others are recruiting. Internships are mainly based on students preferences, like duration, stupend, paid or unpaid, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good as per fee structure but not so cherished infrastructure. Hostel quality is what I didn't like; obviously, the food after a few months of admission but according to the fee, which is 80k and 1 lakh for 4 students and 2 students per year, that is fine .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges in Jharkhand.

content.Placements: Approximately 90% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 12.4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.8 LPA. The average salary package offered was 5.7 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Wipro, Extramarks, and Tata. In this college, teachers work hard on students and build their confidence.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available. The campus environment was good. Wi-Fi was enabled in our college. Classrooms were well-maintained. The library was also provided. The laboratory was better. Hostel rooms were good. Our campus was free from ragging. The mess was great. Canteen was also average. First aid box was also available.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

hostel_campus.college_name: Jharkhand Rai University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My college information and fee structure.
reviews.review_text: My college provides us with a cafeteria, canteen, library, and many other facilities. Hostel timings are from 6:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Famous places around our university include Marasalli Hill and a few places, but there are not too many because our institute is located in a very outside area.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with the college placements, but the infrastructure and facilities are really good.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, canteen, library, and medical facilities are provided. The syllabus for the college placements is good, and the infrastructure and faculty of the Science department are also good. There are some issues with campus connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Jharkhand Rai University (JRU).
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our institute are not more. Our college provides students with many facilities. There is no Wi-Fi. Air-conditioned classrooms are not available. They give students many things like a library, labs, digital classrooms, etc. The quality of our hostel is good. The mess and canteen are good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good. Teachers and faculty members are so nice and supportive.
reviews.review_text:
Everything is good as per fee structure but not so cherished infrastructure. 
Hostel quality is what I didn't like; obviously, the food after a few months of admission but according to the fee, which is 80k and 1 lakh for 4 students and 2 students per year, that is fine .

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Jharkhand.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available. The campus environment was good. Wi-Fi was enabled in our college. Classrooms were well-maintained. The library was also provided. The laboratory was better. Hostel rooms were good. Our campus was free from ragging. The mess was great. Canteen was also average. First aid box was also available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members at this college are knowledgeable, so I recommend enrolling there.
reviews.review_text: There are numerous facilities available. The library is available. We have a computer lab, a B. Pharma lab, Wi-Fi, huge classrooms with projectors, and many more facilities. The canteen is available for students and faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jharkhand Rai University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is good. The campus consists of four buildings in total. All departments are located in different buildings. In the hostel, there were four people sharing a room, which cost Rs. 30000 per semester. Everyone has their own locker, and every room has an attached bathroom. The hostel has a common hall and a common balcony. The food provided is not that good. They kept serving rice every time. The registration form for the hostel is to be filled in at the time of admi...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college for me to make my career.
reviews.review_text: We have 2 campuses among which, 1 is fully developed and the another one is under construction. In the upcoming 2 years, it's going to have a great infrastructure. Being an agriculture student, we have so many facilities and a large amount of field for practical work which is going to help us a lot.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: It has good labs, a good library, good classrooms, and full Wi-Fi connectivity. The hostel is very clean, and the quality of the food served is also good. The canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are also good. Hostelers are very good. In our hostel, various food options are available. All sports are available. There is a very good friendly atmosphere in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for the BBA course in Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: The college has every facility and infrastructure. Every important department is available here. It has a library, many classrooms, 2 computer labs, and a wonderful cafeteria. I did not stay in the hostel, and we are not allowed to go over there. The infrastructure of the hostel is good, but I do not know much about food.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for students to pursue higher studies in budget and with scholarships.
reviews.review_text: A computer lab, a library, mess and hostel facilities are available here. There is a huge building for academics. A canteen is available, with every food item. Students can stay in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: It is a best college for a middle class student to study higher studies.
reviews.review_text: It has the worst college hostel, do not join in the college hostel. It is better to take some private hostel or room near the college. Library is good. Labs are good. Our canteen is not good. Some sports are there on the ground.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is very good for studies.
reviews.review_text: The college provides all the facilities like classrooms, library, sports etc. Medical facilities and Wi-Fi were not available. Quality of classrooms and labs was good enough for study purpose. Quality of food in the canteen was good. Hostel rooms were good.

reviews.review_heading: Giving opportunities to learn to the poor class of our society.
reviews.review_text: It has a well infrastructure which is of 3 floors. The classrooms are well maintained. The building has also a small ground and a canteen. There is also hostel facilities for boys and girls. Although this building is rented. But the university administration has making its own campus according to the norms of UGC and it has running the classes of B.Sc.  Agriculture there. It has planned to make a well infrastructure university and it is doing that in its best possible way.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my university, and this is good in this range.
reviews.review_text: Here, we have good classrooms with projectors, with long-range overhead Wi-Fi. There are physics, chemistry, and agricultural labs. For engineering students, we have workshops, engineering labs as well as the best faculty to facilitate ourselves. The canteen is rich and full of good and tasty foods. Hostels are of both types. There are dormitory as well as flats. There is a library handling 5,000 books with different writers. Here, we have medical facilities, and we have an MBBS doctor along wit...

Ras Bihari Bose Subharti University popular programmes are BSc and MBA. The university offers BSc specialisation across various streams such as Medical Radiology & Imaging Technology, Nursing, Optometry, Computer Science, and others. BSc students can work as Industrial Nurses, Radiology Technician, Radiologist, Data Analyst, etc.
RBBSU Dehradun is one of the eminent universities. The university offers a two-year MBA programme. Through its innovative teaching methods, the institute helps students build a conceptual understanding of the various courses. RBBSU prepares students for real-world and professional experts. Below are some of the programmes offered by the Ras Bihari Bose Subharti University:

college_info.intro:
Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences popular programmes are BSc, BPharma, and MBBS. The university offers BSc specialisation in Medical Lab Technician, Perfusion Technology, Radiography & Imagining Technology, Radiotherapy, and others. Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma BSc students can work as Lab Assistants, Medical Technologists, Test Supervisors, X-ray technicians, Imaging Research Managers, and others.
Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma BPharma offers a full-time, four-year programme under the guidance of an expert. After pursuing BPharma students have the opportunity to work in various sectors such as Drug Inspector, Pharmacist, Medical Underwriter, Drug Technician, and others. Below mentioned are some of the popular programmes offered by the Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences:

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need NEET score only to get admission in MBBS and BDS programmes of Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences. For all other programmes, different entrance exams are required. NEET MDS is required for admission to MDS programme. The university considers NEET PG score for admission to MD and MS courses. Besides, Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences conducts CET for admission to some of the UG and PG courses.

The minimum aggregate ranges between 45% and 50%. There is relaxation in aggregate for reserved category candidates. Hence, aspirants with 60% aggregate can get admission provided they also fulfil the selection requirements. Candidates will need to qualify the entrance exam accepted for the applied course.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good here at Geeta University. Almost all eligible students get placed. The highest package of GU is 40 LPA, with an average package of Rs. 6,00,000. They provide internships from the 2nd year itself. As I am doing BCA AIML, which has a good scope.
review_content.Infrastructure: As a BCA AIML student, I can say that the course & curriculum are good here & it is running with advanced technologies. They have Geeta Technical Hub, which not only provides hands-on experience but also makes us industry-ready as they are associated with companies like AWS, CISCO, REDHAT, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: I am enjoying the vibrant atmosphere at Geeta University.

review_content.Placements: The number of placements was decent in my course. At least 80–90 percent got placements, and others opted for higher studies or went abroad to pursue their career in higher studies. Top recruiting companies that came to the campus included Wipro, TCS, HTL Ltd., and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and amenities provided at the campus were much better than what I observed in other institutes. Rather than just providing the best services, they maintained hygiene on the campus, in the mess, and in the classrooms as well. Here, I found the campus catered to services.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fees for BAMS programmes atPandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences?
overview_faqs.answer: Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences was established in the year 2008. It is a NAAC 'A' grade state-level University. BAMS stands for Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery. It is an undergraduate degree programme designed to make students familiar with the concepts of Ayurveda and use them for the treatment of patients. The exam required for BAMS is NEET with 50% score in 10+2 . It offeres a total of 6 courses for a duration of 66 months understand the BAMS specialization. review_summary.college_name: UHSR Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for engineering.

content.Placements: I am part of the 2023-24 batch of this course. About 70-80 percent of students get placed. The package offered ranges from 3-8 LPA. The average package offered is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters include reputed industry companies. 70 percent of students got internships in well-known organisations.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, a good library, and a Wi-Fi campus. The hostel facilities are clean and comfortable. Mess and canteen food are decent. Basic medical care, sports grounds, and indoor games are also available for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good knowledge.

content.Placements: Almost 95 out of 100 students were placed in my course and others moved to further studies. The highest package in my course was 20 LPA and the lowest package was 24 LPA. Top recruiting companies in my course are TCS, Infosys, HCL, etc. Almost 90 out of 100 students got internships in my course. Software engineer, tester, etc. roles were offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are available in Puran Murti campus and very good infrastructure is available for my course. Best computer labs for coding. Best computers with good processing speed. All books are available in the library. Good facilities are available in the hostel. Daily new variety of food is available. I like that.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: NIMCET scores are compulsory to join MCA.

content.Placements: College with multiple plans to create opportunities by tempting the drives conducted by different types of companies with various packages. The top professional corporates like TCS and Accenture are the primary companies that offer recruitment for MCA candidates at 5 to 8 percent, other companies offer 40 to 45 percent placement with an average package.
content.Infrastructure: For the kind information, as the college occupies an acre of space, all the facilities are found within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (Hons.) Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning in collaboration with Samatrix.io - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good experience at Geeta University!

content.Placements: Placements are good here at Geeta University. Almost all eligible students get placed. The highest package of GU is 40 LPA, with an average package of Rs. 6,00,000. They provide internships from the 2nd year itself. As I am doing BCA AIML, which has a good scope.
content.Infrastructure: As a BCA AIML student, I can say that the course & curriculum are good here & it is running with advanced technologies. They have Geeta Technical Hub, which not only provides hands-on experience but also makes us industry-ready as they are associated with companies like AWS, CISCO, REDHAT, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) (Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am enjoying the vibrant atmosphere at Geeta University.

content.Placements: The number of placements was decent in my course. At least 80–90 percent got placements, and others opted for higher studies or went abroad to pursue their career in higher studies. Top recruiting companies that came to the campus included Wipro, TCS, HTL Ltd., and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and amenities provided at the campus were much better than what I observed in other institutes. Rather than just providing the best services, they maintained hygiene on the campus, in the mess, and in the classrooms as well. Here, I found the campus catered to services.

admission_overview.college_name: UHSR Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Application & Selection

paragraphs: UHSR admissions 2025are primarily entrance-based. The university considers NEET UG, NEET MDS, NEET PG and other entrance exam scores for admission to specific courses.UHSRalso conduct CET or Common Entrance Test for some of the BSc, MSc and MPT programmes. Pt. BD University offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in the fields of Medicine, Nursing, Physiotherapy, Allied Health Sciences, etc., through affiliated colleges. Interested candidates can apply online forUHSR admissions.

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences offers 75 courses in full-time mode. Candidates can apply for the course of their choice via online mode. Below are the keyUHSR admissionhighlights:

Candidates wishing to apply for a course need to fulfil Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences eligibility criteria. The selection for most of the programmes is based on national-level entrance exam scores. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Below are popularUHSR coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
She/ he should have completed 6 months internship at or before the time of counselling

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences fee varies course-wise. The total fee of UHSR is a sum of tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, etc. Candidates shall be able to pay the fee annually or semester-wise. Below are top UHSR courses along with their fee and average package:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The university specifies the intake capacity for all the offered courses. Candidates are offered seat based on their entrance exam scores. Aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Below is theUHSR seat intakefor popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences reserves some seats for reserved category candidates. Out of the total intake, 50% of the seats are filled under State Quota seats. Remaining 50% of seats are filled under the Management Category. The university reserves 5% of State Quota seats for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities.

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences admission processbegins with registration for the preferred course. Candidates taking admission via the entrance exam must first fill out the application form for the respective exam. Below are the steps to get admission in UHSR:

Candidates can download the application form from the official website of the university. They can also get the prospectus and the application form from the Controller of Finance, Pt BD Sharma UHS, Rohtak.

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences selects candidates for admission based on their entrance exam scores. The university considers NEET UG scores for MBBS and BDS programme. UHSR also conduct a Common Entrance Test or CET for BSc, MSc, BPT, MPT and other courses. The university also accepts entrance exams such asNEET PG,NEET SS,GPAT, etc. for admission to specific courses.

Once the selection process is over, UHSR releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. The merit list is released round-wise. Candidates with their names need to participate in the counselling round.

MBBS students are allotted seat through Haryana NEET Counselling. HSTES conducts counselling for MPT, BPharm and other courses. Candidates are required to come with the specified documents for verification. Aspirants who have been allotted a seat need to pay theUHSR feeto confirm their admission.

courses_data.name: UHSR MPT Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences offers Master's in Physiotherapy for two-years at the PG level. Candidates need to pass BPT from any recognised college of Physiotherapy to apply for MPT. Aspirants should also complete a months internship at or before at the time of counselling. The selection for MPT is based on CET score.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MPT at UHSR?
faqs.answer: Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences admissions to MPT programme is based on Common Entrance Test conducted by the university. CET is conducted for a duration of three hours. The entrance exam consists of one paper. The paper include objective questions in English language. Once the results are out, candidates are selected for MPT admission. Aspirants need to participate in counselling for document verification and seat allotment.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MPT at UHSR?
faqs.answer: Candidates must complete BPT from any recognised college of Physiotherapy to apply for MPT. Candidates should also have completed 6 months internship at or before the time of counselling for MPT programme.Aspirants should also be registered or must have applied for registration with the Haryana State Council for Physiotherapy at the time of counselling (Documentary proof regarding the same has to be produced at the time of counselling).

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences UG courses. The minimum aggregate ranges between 45% and 50%. There is relaxation in aggregate for reserved category candidates. Hence, aspirants with 60% aggregate can get admission provided they also fulfil the selection requirements. Candidates will need to qualify the entrance exam accepted for the applied course.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for UHSR?
faqs.answer: Candidates are first required to fill out the application form for Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences.  The university considers NEET UG scores for MBBS and BDS programme. Besides, UHSR also conduct a Common Entrance Test or CET for BSc, MSc, BPT, MPT and other courses. The university also accepts entrance exams such as NEET PG, NEET SS, GPAT, etc. for admission to specific courses.

faqs.question: Can I join Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences without NEET?
faqs.answer: Candidates needNEETscore only to get admission in MBBS and BDS programmes of Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences. For all other programmes, different entrance exams are required. NEET MDS is required for admission to MDS programme. The university considers NEET PG score for admission to MD and MS courses. Besides, Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences conducts CET for admission to some of the UG and PG courses.

reviews.review_heading: I am enjoying the vibrant atmosphere at Geeta University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and amenities provided at the campus were much better than what I observed in other institutes. Rather than just providing the best services, they maintained hygiene on the campus, in the mess, and in the classrooms as well. Here, I found the campus catered to services.

reviews.review_heading: My overall campus life experience at Geeta University has been positive and enriching.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility at Geeta University is comfortable and well managed, making it convenient for students coming from different states. All the classrooms are fully air conditioned with smart boards. Infrastructure is high class. The mess food is decent and hygienic, offering a balanced menu with North Indian meals, occasional special dishes and options for vegetarian students.

reviews.review_text: There are good facilities but need to make food more better. Piet has a good computer lab and Wi-Fi smart classrooms. A hostel room is decent, but food is average, basic medical services are available and sports facilities help in the overall department.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best college in Delhi NCR.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I like my college a lot, and I assume that others will like it too, as it's a worthwhile college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is to my liking as it has lots of greenery, a few big grounds, and many smaller ones. Although I didn't opt for a hostel, when I visited my friend, I noticed that the hostel was Wi-Fi equipped. Rooms were clean, and bathrooms were good. The food was to my liking, too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in Sonipat for programming students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a green environment, great classrooms and the best library. There is no air pollution as the area is full of greenery without any noise pollution. reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure, staff, and teachers are really good.
reviews.review_text: I mostly love the infrastructure of my campus. There are smart classes available on campus, proper lighting, false ceilings, proper windows, airy and big rooms are available. reviews.review_heading: Education at best- Puran Murti campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. All the labs are well-maintained. They have hangers for three aircraft to be placed. The environment is very good here. This campus is recommended for all students for different courses like B.Tech. Management and pharmacy.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: Around 150 students are accepted here every year based on Neet UG rank & eligibility. We follow the CBME curriculum, which is more clinical-based than before. There is a one-year compulsory rotation or internship following 4.5 years study. Approx. 10,000 is paid for internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the basic facilities and amenities are available in the college for studies. We have separate building for each subject in the first 2 years, and we have have separate building for attending lectures. A 24-hour functioning restaurant is present within the campus. The library is open every day till 10 p.m., except Sunday.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied up to a certain extent.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in the MBBS course. You have to apply for a job in the private or government sector. You can get a job as a junior doctor in any private or government hospital. You can also open your own private clinic. You can also serve in the army; there is a separate exam for that.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average, but our college is well-equipped with all the equipment required for practical knowledge. Every lab every year is well-equipped. The hospital is also well-equipped with all the equipment. The hostel is also average, and the food is not up to par for North Indian students or vegetarian students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied only to a certain extent.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in the MBBS course; you have to search for a job after completing your degree or study further for PG to get better job options. You can get a job in government and private hospitals after MBBS and also open your own clinic. Additionally, you can get a chance to serve in the army.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. Classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with boards and projectors. The college is well-equipped with all necessary equipment for practical labs. Every lab is well-equipped. The library has all the books related to medical studies and also features an e-library. However, the hostel food is not suitable for North Indian vegetarian students.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital.

content.Placements: The college is a medical college, so there is no concept of placement. Some people who complete their MBBS course from here prefer to give NEET PG or transfer to the Middle East for good opportunities. Kerala itself has low employment if you are just an MBBS student. No companies are coming for placement. Students have to do a permanent 1-year internship where they help and learn more about the practical knowledge of a doctor.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are quite big. It's an old college established in 2002, so the classrooms are like those of a government college. A smart board is there for lectures, with no Wi-Fi facility available in class. The library is quite big, and all the skill labs and subject labs are properly maintained. The quality of the hostel is bad. There is no choice, you must take triple occupancy as there is not enough space, especially in the girls' hostel. There is no canteen in the hostel, and the mess of the college is the worst; the food is not even good, hygienic, and they charge too much for it.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. Somervell Memorial CSI Medical College and Hospital.

content.Placements: The college does not provide any placement, but it does provide internship opportunities. There is a 1-year compulsory rotation internship that is required to be given to the students by the college in their own hospital, and we are paid for the same too.
content.Infrastructure: This college is mostly inclined academically, and here most of the faculty are highly qualified and experienced and always ready to help you out. its all about your interest and dedication, which you need to take in with the faculty, and they are happy to help you out. Hostel life is bad. The mess food is the worst, and the administration mostly does not do anything about it. No matter the amount of complaining you do, it still remains the same. You have to adjust to it. We do have a gym in the hostel, which could be used by the student, but the facilities are below par, and there is a lack of necessary equipment.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good. Wi-Fi is not available in classrooms and the library. The library is good, and all books and latest magazines are available for research and the medical field. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is not good. Wi-Fi facility is not available in classrooms, laboratory, and library. The food served in the mess is not upto the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied in terms of faculty and infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure are at par the level. Wi-Fi is not available, classrooms have no signal at all. Labs and library are good with all facilities. Rooms are spacious and large with double rooms. Medical facilities are free for the students studying here. Sports and games are regular .

reviews.review_heading: Our college is fine and can go for it.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility. There are 4 decent lecture halls. Labs are well-equipped. Library is very big with all the necessary books, journals, etc. for medical education. Hostel is either 3 per room or double sharing. Common bathrooms and attached bathrooms are also available. Mess food is average. Canteen provides shawarma and panipuri in addition to other snacks and shakes.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good and self-financing college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great, and the facilities are very good. Library, classrooms and labs are well-developed and well-equipped. Hostels have a great environment, and almost every facility is available. Food is also good, and we get an adequate quantity of food in the hostel. Medical facilities and sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The library is fine, the mess food is homely. The college is well known for sports. Once a year intercollege dance and arts festival is organised. Sports and arts are encouraged by the faculty. The library consists of all kinds of books.

reviews.review_heading: The college is best for all medical studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. The college blends with nature. Hostel facilities are good. The lecture hall is big and can accommodate 200 students. A private park for college students is available. The college canteen is available, and the hospital building is good. There are sufficient B.Ed availabilities for parents.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculties, average infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: So our college and hostel infrastructure is average and is not upto expectations of the fees that is being paid. It's just like a government college and even the government colleges have more good infrastructure and facilities provided for them. It's not upto our expectations.

review_summary.college_name: Aditya Pharmacy College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Aditya - a university where I love nature most, eco eco-friendly campus, an anti-ragging campus.

content.Placements: There is almost 100 percent placement in Aditya Pharmacy College for B. Pharmacy. The top recruiting companies are Dr. Reddy's, Laila Nutraceuticals, Divis Laboratories, Optum, and MSN Laboratories. The average package during summer internships ranges from 2.5 LPA to 4 LPA. Every student gets an opportunity to complete a one-month internship. The main roles in B. Pharmacy involve work in sales, manufacturing units, and medical coding.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available include smart classes and laboratories equipped with chemicals. The library is well-maintained, featuring journals, pharmacopeia, and essential books for semester exams. Wi-Fi is accessible across the campus, which has an anti-ragging policy, and hostel facilities are good (three members in a room), with air conditioning available. Various tournaments have been organized for hostel residents, such as the Aditya Premier League and the Aditya Football League. Food quality is good, with South Indian breakfast options including idli, upma, and boiled eggs, among others.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma. Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A great college. We enjoyed it a lot. Everyone got placed and are going to lead a happy life.

content.Placements: In our college, around 65 out of 100 students are placed through campus interviews.The highest salary package offered so far is 3.5 LPA. If we attend more interviews, we shall secure higher salary packages. Internships are based on students' interests, and anyone who wants to join can participate. Currently, the available role offered is Field Officer. Companies that have offered placements are Wipro, Optum, Dr. Reddy's, Laila Pharmaceuticals, and more companies that will be visiting our campus.
content.Infrastructure: Everything at Aditya Pharmacy College is perfect, including infrastructure, spacious classrooms and labs, and a very big library. There is a student resting room. Hostels are clean and hygienic, with a variety of foods according to students' regional preferences. Campus has more than 10 canteens and a large ground. Sports and games facilities are available such as volleyball, handball, shuttle, cricket, football, kabaddi, and more. Apollo Shine medical care is available on campus 24/7 for any emergencies.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides top-notch infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is more than 90%. Sun Pharma and Davis Laboratories, etc., visit our college. Almost 60% of students got placed in medical companies. The remaining 40% of students joined hospitals as clinical pharmacists.

admission_overview.college_name: Aditya Pharmacy College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Aditya Pharmacy College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Aditya Pharmacy College considers scores in AP EAMCET, AP ECET, and AP PGECET for admission to specific courses.Aditya Pharmacy Collegeoffers courses at the UG, PG and Doctorate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,60,000 - 4,75,672. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,67,000 - 4,40,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good infrastructure. We have very neat labs. Classrooms are very neat. The food served in the canteen is average. The prices are very high. reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with the quality of education.
reviews.review_text: There is a digital library in this college. Computer labs are very good. Labs are provided with all the required instruments. Hostel rooms are very good. The food is the worst all the time. The hostel fee is very expensive, which is greater than the college fee.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Very good facilities and infrastructure are there. Good quality of food is provided in the canteen. Hostel and rooms are also clean and hygienic. Cultural events are organised. Library is available along with Wi-Fi. Security is also very high in our hostels and campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in hostels. They provide separate mess for North Indians. It has very neat and clean labs. The library contains all types of books to study. Food quality is somewhat disappointing.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college placements .
reviews.review_text: Labs are well equipped and hostels are well maintained. They are hygienic and in mess, different types of curries will be there. Quality of food is not so good. Apollo pharmacy visits the college. Classrooms are well equipped and projectors are available in every classroom.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in terms of studies, faculty, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Almost all facilities, like a mess, canteen, Wi-Fi, restaurant, hostel, labs, libraries, indoor stadium, classrooms, a gym, parks, etc., were available. The quality of facilities in the hostel was good. The food in the canteen was good. Medical facilities, sports, and games were good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with good placements. I am absolutely satisfied with Aditya.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus. Aditya is the best college in the east Godavari in terms of infrastructure. Classrooms are large enough to hold more than 60% of the students, and the library contains a variety of books for gaining knowledge. The hostel is comfortable. The food is good. There is a separate mess for both the south and the north.

reviews.review_heading: The environment of our college is good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel environment and infrastructure of our college were very good. We have a good quality of equipment and materials in the laboratories. The Wi-Fi was good. The library contains many books. The classrooms were very spacious. The canteen was maintained hygienically and neatly.

reviews.review_heading: Join this college and learn everything about Pharmacy, and take regular help from faculty.
reviews.review_text: In Hostels, Library, and classrooms facilities are good. Wi-Fi is available on the campus, and it is only available for hostlers but not for day scholars. There is a rule on the campus that mobile phones are prohibited. The labs and classrooms are good. Hostel food is good, but canteens food is not that great. If anything happens to a student, then they take you to the hospital. There will be an extra hour for games if you want to play, and the ground is also huge.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is famous for studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There are many facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, study rooms, etc. The quality of facilities provided is fine, and the food served in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are available. The interesting part is that sports and games are also offered in our college, and students will like them and have fun. It is also very comfortable.

review_content.Placements: Almost all students are placed at reputed institutions and government colleges. Packages for every student are also nice. Internships are provided to all the students with a stipend of ₹18,000 and PG seats are also there in the college so you can prepare.

content.Placements: Government Medical College Gondia provides MBBS and several MD courses. After completion of the academic MBBS course, it’s followed by a year of internship within the college with an average stipend of 18,000 rupees/month (as of 2025). Students passing out with an MBBS degree are obliged to work as medical officers under the year-long bond placed by the state government, with an average salary of 80,000-120,000 rupees/month. Students after graduation pursue higher postgraduate medical courses through NEET PG (as of 2025).

reviews.review_heading: Government Medical College Gondia
reviews.review_text:
College: Being a government medical college integrated into a district hospital (KTS District Hospital and BGW Women's Hospital), there’s a visible lack of infrastructure regarding academic purposes. There are 3 lecture halls, enough to accommodate 150 students, and one lecture hall with a capacity of more than 500 students at once. All lecture halls are equipped with smart digital screens, Wi-Fi, microphones, and speakers.
Hostel: Hostels (5 floors + lift) for boys and girls are present on the ...

reviews.review_heading: Government Medical College, Gondia, in Maharashtra, offers admission .
reviews.review_text: This college infrastructure quality is very good and uses high-quality products and provides multiple facilities like classrooms, labs, libraries, gardens, games rooms, canteens, etc. Facilities are provided. The college canteen food is very tasty, and homemade food is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Opinion of a medico in simple language.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the worst. Hostels are overcrowded or, say, more than overcrowded. You don't even get enough space to breathe. In college, there is a small library but not all students are allowed there; you have to sit in lecture halls to study. There is no mess, only tiffin centres.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is divided into two parts. One part is  Kuwar Tilak Singh Hospital, and the other is Bai Gangabai Hospital. Our college provides free medical facilities in the nearby government hospital. The hostel has a canteen and a volleyball ground. The hostel has 7 buildings with triple occupancy rooms and lifts.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in academics with high patient flow and good hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is quite good but the 1st-year hostel is away from the college. Bus facility is provided by the college. Hostel provided in the 2nd year is very good which is like a flat. Hostel has a canteen and volleyball ground. Main building of our college is not yet built but from 15 days construction started.

reviews.review_heading: The education quality will not be compromised even if the infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is divided into two parts, KTS campus (Kuwar Tilak Sih Hospital) and BGW campus (Bai Gangabai Woman Hospital), present on either side of the road. Each department has laboratories with needed equipment and chemicals. An e-library is available with AC facilities. A reading hall and lecture halls are available. The hostel has lift facilities in the 5-floor building of 10 flats of 2BHK size. It has RO water facility, sports facilities, security guard and a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of its academics but it slightly disappoints due to a lack of a good campus.
reviews.review_text: At this time, there is an old building we are studying in but our college's new campus will be there soon. It's a work in progress. Hostels are quite good in the form of flats and we also have a canteen there. Medical facilities are available 24 hours a day, and security for girls is also good. There is a protective environment for students.

reviews.review_heading: College review by a student
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the worst here . One cannot imagine such an infrastructure ever . There is no Wi-Fi , hostels are overcrowded as hell there is no space to breath , there is no privacy and no space , also there is no mess here so you have to struggle a lot with food but tiffin centres are available

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Laboratories are available, but there is no Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are average. They provide lecture halls as study halls after classes. Library is available but is small to accommodate all the students. Hostel is not good. Mess and sports facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is small with excellent teachers.
reviews.review_text: Government Medical College and Hospital in Gondia are divided into two parts. One is Kuwar Tilak Singh College and Hospital, and the other is BGW Bai Ganga Bai Hospital for Women. We have separate hostels for girls and boys. Hostels are in the form of flats ranging from 2 BHK to 3 BHK.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty members but small campus.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi in the campus. Classrooms and library are well-equipped and up to date. Medical facilities are provided for free in the nearby government hospital. We do prepare for sports and games to take part in competition but there is no such ground in the campus. No canteen is available in the campus. Hostel rooms are good and newly built. The only thing is that the college campus is very much small as compared to other medical colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Gondia, by a 2nd Year MBBS Student
reviews.review_text: The college lacks infrastructure. It has only the old hospital and college building since 2016, which looks like it hasn’t been renovated since then. The same applies to hostels. Both boys’ and girls’ hostels are very congested. First-year students do not have their own hostel. They rent ITI and Polytechnic hostels. The college does not have a proper campus.

Calicut University popular programmes are BTech and BSc. After doing a BSc course from the University of Calicut, students can enter into various industries such as the Agriculture Industry, Oil Industry, and others. BSc Calicut University graduates can find various suitable job roles at Educational Institutes, Space Research Institutes, Wildlife and Fishery Departments, and others. BTech is provided in five specialisations such as Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and Printing Technology.
University of Calicut Kerala is ranked 101-150 by NIRF 2025 under the University (Overall) category. BTech and BSc students are placed in top companies such as Accenture- Bangalore, E2 Open-Bangalore, and others. The university offers UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral courses, under 35 different departments divided into nine schools, for different streams, such as Engineering, Science, Law, Commerce, and Management, among others. admission_overview.college_name: Calicut University Admissions 2026: Application Process, Eligibility, UGCAP, Dates & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: University of Calicut Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: University of Calicut admissions are both merit and entrance-based depending on the programme. The university is popularly known as Calicut University. For the majority of its UG and PG courses, the university accepts admissions through a Centralised Admission Process (CAP). CAP offers the facility for online submission of applications to various colleges and courses under Calicut University. It offers various courses, under a total of 35 departments which is divided into nine schools, across different streams, namely Commerce, Engineering, Science, Law and Management, among others. The university offers courses in full-time mode at the college campus. The application process of Calicut University is done htrough online mode. Calicut University conducts the admission test for Calicut University Common Admission Test (CUCAT) to PG and PG Integrated programmes. Alternatively, students can also submit scores of other accepted national or state-level exams.

eligibility_selection.title: University of Calicut Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Calicut University Kerala offers multiple courses in different fields through its various schools and departments. These courses are offered at UG, PG, and Diploma levels. Admission to all courses is subject to a valid score in the national/state-level entrance exam along with the fulfillment of the minimum eligibility criteria set by the university. The general eligibility for Calicut University course admission is as below: Students from the SEBC and SC/ST categories are allowed relaxation in percentage as per rules, i.e., 5% relaxation for SEBC and a mere pass for SC/ST candidates. Students can submit either national-level exams, such as JEE Main/ CAT/ CMAT/ GATE, etc or appear for state-level exams include KCET/ KEAM. Calicut University also conducts CUCAT to select students.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for University of Calicut admission?

faqs.answer: No, its not hard to get admission at Calicut University. The university offers UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral courses, under 35 different departments divided into nine schools, for different streams, such as Engineering, Science, Law, Commerce, and Management, among others. Admission to various courses is based on merit and entrance exam scores. The accepted entrance exams are CMAT, CAT, KMAT, KMAT KERALA, and others. The university's admission process begins with an online application.
faqs.question: Is Calicut University hard to get?

paragraphs: University of Calicut admissionsare offered based on a preset admission criteria. Students need to clear all the steps to get a seat at the university. The process includes application, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Interested students can follow the steps below to complete theCalicut Universityadmission process:

Candidates must register on theofficial website of Calicut University. Once registered can now fill out the online application form online and pay the application fee. For the UG courses, it is mandated to register through the Centralised Admission Process (CAP). Students can register at theCalicut University official websitethrough the university'sDirectorate of Admissions.

The University shortlists candidates based on their performance in the course-wise entrance exams. For most of the UG courses CAP exam is valid. For few PG courses, the university conducts its entrance exams, CUCAT for shortlisting candidates.

Students need to report for verification of documents and a counselling process. The seats will be allocated based on the admission criteria. Shortlisted candidates who make it to the final merit list have to pay the tuition fees and finalise their seats in the University.

TheCalicut University feesrange from INR 3,100 to INR 33.3 lakh. Candidates have to pay the fee to finalise their seats in the University. Calicut University, through406 affiliated collegesand various departments, the university offers seats for its various courses. Find below the Calicut University seats and fees :

The applicant may visit the university's website regularly for updates. Admission procedure is online, and due dates, such as application closing date, are intimated before the date.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for the MBA course at Calicut University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must have UG degree with at least 50% is required to apply forMBAcourse. Applicants must also have 2-years of work experience. Students are to appear for entrance exams such asCMAT,CAT,KMAT,KMAT KERALA, etc.

placement_data.title: Calicut University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: University of Calicut has concluded its placement season though, the 2025 placement report is yet to be released. However, the NIRF Report for 2025 has been released. During University of Calicut placements 2024 a total of 282 post graduate students were placed. Out of 912 PG 2-year students 271 students secured placements. The median package offered to PG 2-year courses like MBA , MCA , etc. was INR 3 LPA . Further, a total of 11 PG 3-year students were also placed during the 2024 University of Calicut placement drive. For PG 3-year courses like Masters of surgery , MD , and others the median package stood at INR 6 LPA.

The University grants admission to MD and MS courses through NEET PG scores followed by NEET PG Counselling. According to the MD/MS Cutoff 2025 for the General AI candidates, the cutoff ranged from 79 to 71227, wherein MD in Radio Diagnosis was the hardest course for admission.

For candidates belonging to All India Quota, NEET PG Last Round seat allotment for Calicut University MD/ MS cutoff 2025 stood at 79 for MD in Radio Diagnosis for the General category AI candidates. In 2024, MD in Radio Diagnosis stood at 19 and in 2023 at 350. On analysing the past three cutoffs, it can be seen that Calicut University has witnessed a fluctuating trend for its most competitive MD specialisation. highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is Calicut University. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #38 under State Public University category. Calicut University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Calicut University rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 5th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Kerala In 2025

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Calicut University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Calicut University fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Calicut University fell 12 ranks to #101 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It can be seen that; in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Calicut University climbed 5 ranks to #38 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Calicut University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, Calicut University fell 99 ranks to #700 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Calicut University fell 35 ranks to #214 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
