reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Muhammed Abdurahiman Memorial Orphanage CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M. Com. course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are wonderful for learning, however, the hostel is not worth the money due to its archaic design. The hostel features a football and cricket pitch, however, it has not been completely rebuilt. Aside from that, our college campus is spotless and organized. The facility covers around 100 acres.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Al-Ameen Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This is a good college compared to near self-financing colleges in Palakkad.
reviews.review_text: I'm a hostel student. My home is in Malappuram. At the hostel, we have non-veg food daily, as lunch and on Sunday, only veg food. It is not bad. Hygienic food, then for a monthly fee is nearly Rs. 5000. Transportation through Pattambi, Manarkkad and Palakkad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Farook Institute of Management StudiesReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I think it's the best college for the MBA Course.
reviews.review_text: Students at our college have access to many facilities and services. Bus service, a digital classroom, a gym, a digital library, and Wi-Fi are all available. The boys' and girls' hostels are separate. Students are provided with sports and game equipment to help them thrive in college activities. I have had no concerns with our college's infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best university for M.Com. course.
reviews.review_text: Our university infrastructure is excellent since the setting is conducive to university life. Infrastructure is likewise new, with free Wi-Fi available on campus for anyone. They also feature a vast study library and a place where students can learn new skills. There are also clinics at our university.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Al-Ameen Engineering CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Here in my college, both career and college life are awesome. I really loved it here.
reviews.review_text: About the infrastructure in my college, the hostel and canteen are neat and well-maintained. A food inspection from FSSAI was conducted a few months ago in my college. Due to these factors, the college canteen and hostel food is not bad. My college has held 8 Wi-Fi facilitated computer labs, and many entrance exams like JEE, KEAM, etc., are held in my college because of the many computer labs.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university for the M.Com course.
reviews.review_text: The department offers classrooms with Wi-Fi, modern laboratories, and a well-stocked library. Hotels are clean with comfortable rooms. We get healthy food in the mess and clean restaurants. It also has a stadium. The campus is safe with round-the-clock security and modern facilities to support student needs and extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by MES College of EngineeringReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The reality of MS College of Engineering, Kuttipuram.
reviews.review_text: About infrastructure, it is quite good, we have a nice library, labs, auditorium. The classes have quite good infrastructure. We have Wi-Fi in labs and separate Wi-Fi for normal usage in college, on phones, but we pay for it in 1st year, and canteens are quite okay.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by KPPM College of Teacher EducationReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the B.Ed course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is super. The college provided both a project room and an NS room. Classrooms are good, but outdated. They lack project facilities. Additionally, a canteen and basic accommodations are available. The college can provide a small amount of extra infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Sree Vivekananda College,EdakkaraReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college for the B.Ed course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of the college were excellent. The college's facilities, including the labs, library, and classrooms, are immaculate. Wi-Fi is available even in our college classrooms. In our college, athletics and other cultural pursuits are valued in addition to academics. Every year, they are honored with tremendous significance.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by St. Mary's College, Sulthan BatheryReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of St. Mary's College, Sulthan Bathery.
reviews.review_text: There is no free Wi-Fi. Labs are good. Many computers are not working. There is no big lab. The hostel is good, but the quantity of food served is very low. The canteen is good but not big. The college is good at sports and NCC. The medical support is bad here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Blossom Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 10 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: You can absolutely choose Blossom College Kondotty for sure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college I'm studying, which is Blossom College, Kondotty, has a standard infrastructure, they have toilets for both boys and girls separately. There are plenty of trees in our college. There is no Wi-Fi or any more cosmetics. They also have bus services.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by SAFI Institute of Advanced StudyReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best College for M.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication Course.
reviews.review_text: The college has a reliable Wi-Fi system. Libraries are ordinary. The food supplied is really tasty. It has adequate facilities for sports and activities. The library possesses all of the essential books. The classrooms are well-equipped, which helps the students develop. There is a hospital.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by KPPM College of Teacher EducationReviewed on 6 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for a B.Ed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was mediocre at best. The college offered an NS room along with a project room. The classrooms were good but outdated. There were no project facilities in the classrooms. There were also modest rooms available, and a canteen was present. The college was able to offer limited additional infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Providence Womens CollegeReviewed on 1 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It's the best college for the M.Sc. in Physics Course.
reviews.review_text: Between 72% and 77% of students are recruited from our batch. Students may begin completing campus assignments in the third semester. Big companies like Barclays, Accenture, NTPC, and others came to the university to hire. Each organisation has 25 to 30 registered students. In our sample, the maximum package was 15 LPA, while the average package was around 9 LPA. Nuclear engineers and quantitative analysts are among the most highly sought-after occupations. There are also internships available. ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by EMEA College of Arts and Science, KondottiReviewed on 1 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A good campus with friends, placements & academics. It is strict but joyful. I highly recommend it.
reviews.review_text: EMEA College offers good classrooms, a well organised library, and a basic commerce lab. Canteen is decent but not too good, has snacks, tea, etc. Hostel is clean, mostly used by boys who are in the college football team, and sports facilities are active, with teams in Kerala tournaments, and they provide the best players. Medical aid is good. The hostel mess is average in my opinion.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at MPU University Bhopal are BSc, BTech, and MBA. The University provides these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Madhyanchal Professional University offers specialisations in Engineering and Technology, Medical and Paramedical Sciences, Agriculture Sciences and Technology, Education, Nursing, Sciences and IT, Management and Commerce, etc.
The University offers UG, PG and Diploma level programmes in full-time mode for the duration of 1 year to 4 years. The MPU University Bhopal admission process is through merit and entrance. MPU Bhopal courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Madhyanchal Professional University, Bhopal, in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Madhyanchal Professional University Bhopal admission 2025 to UG, PG and Doctoral programmes is both merit and entrance-based, followed by a counselling round. The University conducts MPUPET for admission to PhD courses. MPU Bhopal also accepts scores in national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, etc., for admission to specific courses.

Candidates willing to get admission must meet the minimum eligibility criteria. To get admission to the MBA programme, candidates must have a minimum aggregate of 50% in their undergraduate degree (45% in case of candidates belonging to the reserved category, i.e. SC/ ST/ OBC category). individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent faculty and facilities, but disappointing placements.

content.Placements: There are many companies that hire students in bulk by giving them a stipend of 3-5 lacs per annum. About 5–10% of the students get hired because of the lack of jobs and their proficiency. 1.8 LPA is the lowest and 8 LPA is the highest package ever in my college. Cipla, Lupin, and TCS are some of the recruiting companies that come for placement. Above 70% of the students in my batch have completed internships at FDA, Bhopal. We can run a shop, join a MNC, prepare for government jobs, join the army as sepoy pharmacists, pass a government job like RRB and serve as railway pharmacists.

individual_reviews.title: Average college with worst management and worst placement rate this year. Infrastructure is everage.

admission_overview.college_name: Madhyanchal Professional University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Application & Selection

paragraphs: MPU Bhopal admission 2025is both merit and entrance-based. The university conductsMPUPETfor admission to PhD courses.MPU Bhopalalso accepts scores in national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, etc., for admission to specific courses. The university offers more than 25 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Commerce, Science, etc. Interested candidates can apply online or offline for admission.

The university offers courses in full-time offline mode. Candidates can fill out the application form online or visit the university for the same. Below are the key highlights related toMPU Bhopal admissions:

Admission to Madhyanchal Professional University is based on a qualifying exam or entrance test scores. The university may conduct MPUCET for admission to UG and PG courses. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses to apply for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 and graduation is required for PG programmes. Below are popularMPU Bhopal coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate with (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)Physics, Chemistry &Mathematicsas compulsory subjects
Bachelor's Degree or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST /OBC)
Bachelor's Degree or equivalent in the relevant discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST /OBC)
Bachelor's Degree or equivalent in relevant discipline
PG degree in relevant discipline with at least 55% aggregate
Note:Candidates applying for UG or PG courses may also need to appear for MPUCET conducted by the university. Reach out to the university for more information on this.
Steps for MPU Bhopal Admission Process 2025

Admissions are currently open at MPU Bhopal. Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply for admission. The university shortlists candidates for admission based on their score in the qualifying exam or entrance test. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. However, aspirants looking for offline applications must visit the campus. Aspirants have to pay an application fee to apply for admission.

The university shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for most of the courses. MPU accepts JEE Main for BTech and UGC-NET/ CSIR-NET/ SLET/ GATE for PhD admission. The university conducts MPUPET for selecting candidates for PhD programme. The university may also conduct MPUCET for admission to UG and PG courses.
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat, candidates are required to pay theMPU Bhopal feeat the time of admission.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Madhyanchal Professional University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Madhyanchal Professional University admission 2025 is currently open. Interested candidates can apply online or fill out the application form offline for admission. The university offers BTech, BBA, MBA etc., courses at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, MPU also offers PhD courses. Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based.

faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses at Madhyanchal Professional University ?
faqs.answer: Candidates who are selected for admission need to pay the course fee as per the frequency set by the university. The fee varies with the course and specialisation selected by the candidates. hostel_campus.college_name: Madhyanchal Professional University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

data: HCL, Infosys, Bosch, Tata, Genpact, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty and facilities, but disappointing placements.
reviews.review_text: We have a multistory building that contains 25 classrooms, 8 labs, 1 library, 4 staffrooms and a principal office. We have a large campus, a playground in beyond, and a canteen at walking distance. The college don't have a hostel so we have to stay at PGs or rental rooms, which is a major problem faced by students. The food in the canteen is outstanding, especially samosas; you will fall in love. The college has its own hospital with 40+ beds and environment is fabulous. We play pool games, badm...

reviews.review_heading:
Average college with worst management and worst placement rate this year.
Infrastructure is everage.
reviews.review_text: The labs are not good at all, and some computers in our lab do not even work. There is no hostel. The food in the canteen is pretty good, but the price is a little bit high. There is also a basketball court and a volleyball court. There is also a massive cricket field.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty members but dissatisfied by the colleges fake scenarios.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure; the canteen facility is excellent as well. There is a library, auditorium, temple, playground, and 7 buildings of 3 floors each. Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory. The medical center is located in the nursing building. The auditorium is very large, with a minimum seating capacity of 100.

reviews.review_heading: The truth of the low-grade college.
reviews.review_text: The college in which I am studying is a low-grade college with poor infrastructure and very bad management. The computer lab is just for show. There is no Wi-Fi on the campus, the library is small, the books there are outdated and it was closed during exam time when we students needed it the most.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in this institution. Labs are available, so you can practice on a laptop or PC in the lab. The library is available. They give us books for 6 months. After that, we return to these books. We play volleyball, cricket, and kabaddi.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, and you can go for it.
reviews.review_text: The labs and library are very good, but the classrooms are not good. Wi-Fi is not available on our campus. Food is affordable. Sports teams are available, and you can play any time. Medical facilities are available at any time.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is beautiful, spacious, and a very nice environment. Wi-Fi is available on campus. Labs, classrooms, and a library are available. Hostel facilities and quality of food served are very nice. A canteen and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are available at our university.

Candidates must apply by attaching the National Talent Hunt Scholarship application form along with other supporting documents during admission.

MPU Bhopal fee structure varies from course to course, depending on the level and duration of it. However, the MPU Bhopal fee structure involves tuition fees, development fees and various other one-time fee components that are to be paid as per the Unviersity guidlines. Although, to conclude, the University has an average fee structure that makes it accessible to the masses.

The University of North Bengal comprises more than 10 departments, including Anthropology, Food Technology, Geology, Sanskrit, Commerce, Management, Zoology, and others. The affiliated college and departments of the university has various courses at the UG, PG, and PhD levels across various streams. MBA, BSc and BA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
NBU offers a full-time, three-four-year BSc programme at the UG level. The BSc programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Geology, Anthropology, Tea Science, and others. The below-mentioned are the University of North Bengal programmes:

reviews_list.review_title: All about my experience in Mathabhanga College.

review_content.Placements: If a student get 50% number in HS, they can get a seat in my college. Now, in new semester system, if a student can get 45% in their HS they can get seat in my college through online. There is no placement system in this college, but if a student scored good results then they can get a seat in various universities, even in JNU.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi available in our campus, labs for scientific research, a library where there are so many books available, and a digital classroom. Although I don't stay in hostel, there are 2 hostels in this college, one for boys and one for girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. LL. B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Decent placements and affordable fees.

review_content.Placements: NBU placement cell facilitates jobs in companies like TCS, Cognizant, and HDFC Bank, with a 40-60% placement rate. Placement support is stronger for professional courses like MBA AND BCA but limited for traditional courses like B.Sc. WITH some BCA roles reaching INR 12 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: NBU 330 ACRES campus features modern classrooms, a well stocked library with 2,23,208 books, and advanced labs for Science and technology. Facilities include wi-fi, a computer center, sports complexes, and auditoriums, though some areas need better maintenance.

review_summary.college_name: University of North Bengal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Nani Bhattacharya Smarak Mahavidyalaya has a very good collection, especially for arts students.

content.Placements: I am Hasrat Ansari, and an ex-student of Nani Bhattacharya Smarak Mahavidyalaya. In 2022, I started my first year of college with many other students. My course is B.A. In my college, there are no extra fees except for the exam and registration. There, I met the best teachers of art. They are really good and sweet and always help students. In my batch, we have almost 30 percent of students placed from college. The total package is a minimum of Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 15,000 for the B.A. course.
content.Infrastructure: As we are all arts students, we get some facilities like a library and some facilities for other honours, like a lab and a testing room. For sports, we also have a club where we have many assets to play and practice. In our college, we have a canteen in good condition and very clean, and the food items are very healthy and tasty. Our college is very disciplined and clean, and we maintain hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A. Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: One of the best overall colleges in the mountains.

content.Placements: The general number of individual placements is high, but the college does not provide direct placement facilities. Although students have a good chance of being selected by multiple companies, the college itself is not directly involved in organizing placements.
content.Infrastructure: There is a lack of lab infrastructure in the Geography department. Although it is one of the best departments in the college. Other science-related departments have better labs and infrastructure. The hostel facilities for girls are better since there are no hostels for boys. But the girls' hostels are better and provide decent food and structure.

content.Placements: If a student get 50% number in HS, they can get a seat in my college. Now, in new semester system, if a student can get 45% in their HS they can get seat in my college through online. There is no placement system in this college, but if a student scored good results then they can get a seat in various universities, even in JNU.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi available in our campus, labs for scientific research, a library where there are so many books available, and a digital classroom. Although I don't stay in hostel, there are 2 hostels in this college, one for boys and one for girls.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL. B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements and affordable fees.

content.Placements: NBU placement cell facilitates jobs in companies like TCS, Cognizant, and HDFC Bank, with a 40-60% placement rate. Placement support is stronger for professional courses like MBA AND BCA but limited for traditional courses like B.Sc. WITH some BCA roles reaching INR 12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: NBU 330 ACRES campus features modern classrooms, a well stocked library with 2,23,208 books, and advanced labs for Science and technology. Facilities include wi-fi, a computer center, sports complexes, and auditoriums, though some areas need better maintenance.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Business Administration - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: An average college for studies, satisfied with the faculty and placements.

content.Placements: Percentage of students placed in my course is approximately 45%. The highest package is ₹15k per month, the average ₹9k per month, and the lowest ₹5k per month. Top recruiters included Indian Bank. Around 60% of students got internships. Companies that offered internships include ICICI Bank, Punjab National Bank, SBI, and Shaping Ideas.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the department are very good. The classrooms are well-organized and equipped with a smart board, speakers, microphones, and Wi-Fi. The library is open to all departments and contains all the necessary books. Hostel facilities are not available, and the food in the canteen is average.

admission_overview.college_name: University of North Bengal Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

paragraphs: North Bengal University admission process 2025is based onmeritfor UG courses while for PG courses admission is granted on the basis ofwritten test and viva. NBU doctoral-level programmes accept a valid score in the NBU entrance exam and personal interview process for admission. The mode of application at NBU is online.

University of North Bengal(NBU) offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes under its 30+ departments, housed under two faculties. It offers courses in various fields includingScience,Commerce, andArtsetc. The university also offers a diploma course and a range of courses under the Directorate of Distance Education.

Located in Siliguri, West Bengal, North Bengal University offers more than400 coursesin various specialisations includingMicrobiology, Law, Mathematics,Economics, Sociology,Mass Communicationetc. These courses are delivered by the excellent faculties of the university. Check out theNBU admission highlights 2025details below:

The basic eligibility for admission at the University of North Bengal is merit in the last qualifying examination. Candidates who have met the basic eligibility can apply for the desired course. The selection of candidates for several courses is done on a merit basis, for others, the scores of national, state, or university-level entrance exams are considered. The table below lists the popular NBU courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

The multiple components included in NBU fees are tuition fees,security deposit,hostel feesmess feesetc. The one-time charges, such as library security deposit, grade card, and more have to be paid once at the time of admission.The courses at various levels at North Bengal University are provided at different course fees and a different number of seats are offered for the courses. Check out the table below to learn more:
Note: Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.

NBU admission process is completely online. Before applying, candidates are required to meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Selection process varies course to course. For PG courses, candidates must appear for entrance examinations, such as CAT, MAT etc. Below are the step by step process for NBU admission:
Step 1: NBU Application Process 2025:Visit the official website @nbu.ac.inand apply

Step 2: Selection:Selection is done on the basis of merit list/ written test/ entrance exam. Admission to the MBA requires a valid score in CMAT/ MAT/CAT/ ATMA/ JMET/XAT/ NBU-MAT, followed by GD and PI. MA, MSc, MCA and LLM admissions are offered on the basis of a written test followed by a viva-voce conducted by the university
Step 3: Payment of Fee:Candidates are required to pay the admission fee for their desired course to secure a seat at NBU.
Check out thevideo belowfor more information:

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by NBU for MCA admission?
faqs.answer: NBU offers MCA courses for a duration of two-years. For MCA admission, NBU accepts the candidates on the basis of WB JECA entrance exam.  The West Bengal Joint Entrance Exam for Computer Application, commonly known as WB JECA is the exam for admission toMCAcourses. The West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board (WBJEEB) conducts the WBJECA every year for admission in the colleges of West Bengal.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for the BA programme in NBU?
faqs.answer: The tuition fee to be paid for a BA at NBU varies with every specialisation available. The tuition fee for the BA course at NBU ranges fromINR 300 - INR 1.2 lakh. However, it includes only the amount paid to college and is calculated as per first year. Actual amount may vary. The above fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is indicative and hence still liable to change. The fee structure at NBU is such that the education imparted is highly affordable.

faqs.question: Is it hard to get admission to NBU?
faqs.answer: North Bengal University admission to a majority of undergraduate and postgraduate courses is based on marks scored in the last qualifying exam followed by a personal interview (PI) round. Candidates who fulfil the eligibility criteria can get admission at NBU. Selection of the candidates is only based on academic performance. Upon selection, candidates need to submit the required documents for the verification process.

placement_report.college_name: University of North Bengal Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: NBU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per North Bengal University NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 5-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.8 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively. Earlier, according to the NIRF report 2023, a total of 73 UG and PG students were placed during North Bengal University placements 2022 . The median package offered to UG (5-year) and PG (2-year) students was INR 60,000 and INR 3.27 LPA during North Bengal University placements 2022, respectively . However, the university recorded nearly 42% hiring rate for UG (5-year) students during placements 2022.
The university has not released the official placement report for the year 2023. However, the NIRF report is available. Candidates can check the link below:

faqs.question: Does North Bengal University have better placements than Siliguri Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: North Bengal University: The median package offered to UG (5-year) and PG (2-year) students was INR 60,000 and INR 3.27 LPA during North Bengal University placements The university offers various courses, and the recruiters at North Bengal University placements 2023 were from various sectors such as education, research, and administration Siliguri Institute of Technology: The institute provides good placements, and almost 40% of students got placed in the civil, mechanical, and electrical engineering divisions The highest salary package offered was 13 LPA, and the average salary package offered varies between 4-5 LPA.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at North Bengal University?
faqs.answer: Bengal Institute of Business Studies is one of the best MBA colleges in Kolkata that provides 100% placement guarantee to its students. Many esteemed MNCs like Aditya Birla, Google, Reliance, Dabur, and 400+ companies visit the campus for Recruitment. BIBS is the only MBA College in Kolkata that gives you corporate exposure and endless networking opportunities that give you an edge over others.

highlights.description: NBU is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #51-100 by the NIRF 2025 under the State Public University category. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The NBU rankings have been explained in the article below:

nirf.description:
NBU has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'State Public University' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, NBU's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

qs_world.description:
NBU has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, NBU fell 350 ranks to #1201 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, NBU fell 119 ranks to #397 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Nani Bhattacharya Smarak MahavidyalayaReviewed on 25 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Nani Bhattacharya Smarak Mahavidyalaya has a very good collection, especially for arts students.
reviews.review_text: As we are all arts students, we get some facilities like a library and some facilities for other honours, like a lab and a testing room. For sports, we also have a club where we have many assets to play and practice. In our college, we have a canteen in good condition and very clean, and the food items are very healthy and tasty. Our college is very disciplined and clean, and we maintain hygiene.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Darjeeling Government CollegeReviewed on 19 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best overall colleges in the mountains.
reviews.review_text: There is a lack of lab infrastructure in the Geography department. Although it is one of the best departments in the college. Other science-related departments have better labs and infrastructure. The hostel facilities for girls are better since there are no hostels for boys. But the girls' hostels are better and provide decent food and structure.

reviews.review_heading: Siliguri College is one of the best colleges in Siliguri/North Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, and classrooms are very clean with comfortable benches. The library is full of many books. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is very good. The canteen is very clean and neat. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Parimal Mitra Smriti MahavidyalayaReviewed on 23 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Mostly yes, I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are okay, average. The infrastructure is well developed. The library is well organised and good. Canteen food is well and tasty, and provides every kind of dish. Sports and games are played often, and students are offered to participate in state-level games. Technical and lab facilities are offered.

reviews.review_heading: CIS means no job, freedom, and loss.
reviews.review_text: The department provides Wi-Fi, but the speed is slow. The classrooms are okay, but no AC and the fans are very slow speed. The library is very bad, with no books available every time. There are no hostels provided for the BCA course, no canteen, no medical facility, and no sports or games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Darjeeling Government CollegeReviewed on 26 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Innovative learning with boundless opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and the facilities at Darjeeling Government College were of exceptional quality and designed to provide students with a world wide learning environment. Library was well-stocked with academic and research materials. Hostels were good and focused on hygiene. Mess food quality was reasonably good.

reviews.review_heading: Memorable days in college.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure like smart room or smart class you can say. Central library is there in our college. Labs for chemistry depth students and many instruments like dumpy level theodolite are there. There is only girls hostel just behind the college very near like 10 meters distance backside.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Acharya Prafulla Chandra Roy  Government CollegeReviewed on 22 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: APCRG College is a very helpful and good college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-F, labs, classrooms, and a central library are available in our college. A departmental library is available in our department.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Kalipada Ghosh Tarai MahavidyalayaReviewed on 22 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the worst government college in Siliguri.
reviews.review_text: There is no good infrastructure. There are no labs for practicals and we will get the basic library facility. There is no mess or cafeteria or any hostel food facility. It has sports and games like cricket, football, and volleyball. Classrooms are filled only during exam times and no students are interested in being in regular classes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Acharya Prafulla Chandra Roy  Government CollegeReviewed on 22 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Maximal deals excel in commutative brings with unity.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we don't have any hostel system or something like that. But we have menu faculty members in our college like central library, college union, sports union, etc. We have a clean cafeteria. The food is good enough for the students and professors.

faqs.answer: A:    CEG admits students to its BSc courses based on marks obtained on Higher Secondary Examination (Class 12) from recognised boards. faqs.answer: No, College of Engineering Guindy is not hard to get for hardworking students. All a student has to do is to prepare for the accepted entrance exams prior to the actual exam date. The accepted entrance exams are TANCET, GATE, and others. Students applying through GATE must prepare as per the GATE books. Students must follow all the preperation tips for a successful admission to College of Engineering Guindy.

review_summary.college_name: College of Engineering Guindy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of good placements and faculty members.

content.Placements: Mostly, 80 percent of the students in Anna University Chennai got placements in good companies. The highest package is around 30 LPA to 40 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3 LPA to 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are TCS, Wipro, Accenture, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Anna University Chennai is good, and laboratories and libraries are available. They provide separate hostels for both boys and girls with free Wi-Fi. Hostel food is not bad. Average in taste. They give importance to sports as well as studies.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Environmental Management - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I like hostel life more as college is strict.

content.Placements: The students from 3rd semester were eligible for placements. Companies like Toyota, EY, Micromax, Accenture, KPMG, Delliote, etc., will come to hire the freshers. The highest package offered was around 20 LPA, and the lowest package was around 4 LPA. The percentage of students getting placed was 70-80%. My plans after degree were to work for 5 years in an MNC.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus was good enough to accommodate 2500 students including two colleges as we had two colleges under the same campus. Blocks were different but common facilities were shared be it library, canteens, sports ground, or the perpetual seminar halls. We had plenty at our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Industrial Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The pride in sharing the greatness of Asia's oldest college.

content.Placements: In our course last year, around 81% of students got placed. The remaining students opt for higher studies abroad. So the remaining students do not apply for placements. The students are being given an enormous number of opportunities for placements.
content.Infrastructure: It is the best infrastructure available among the government colleges. The standards and the fees that we pay are very different. Though the fee is low. The infrastructure is very good. The greenery of the trees within the campus gives a good feeling to stay.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Industrial Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college is a 10 for those who prefer exposure rather than infrastructure.

content.Placements: 50% of students got placed in IT companies and manufacturing companies, mechanical sectors as well. Remaining students focused on building their own company, and some of them are getting into higher studies. The highest package known to me was 18LPA, and the lowest is 4.5 LPA. Companies like TATA, Hyundai, Mahindra, CATERPILLAR, etc. Roles offered are mechanical, automobile, manufacturing, management, data analytics, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available, but the maintenance is poor. Wi-Fi is available, but it lags sometimes. Medical facilities are good enough, and the food is also good. But there is no proper maintenance of restrooms and infrastructure. The canteen still doesn't have Epay, but it is still in development. Cleanliness is at its worst on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college with nice campus and social life.

content.Placements: 26 LPA is the highest package and 5.6 LPA is the lowest, and 6 LPA is the average. Associate engineer is the position offered. Caterpillar recruits more freshers here 70% of students are placed/in internships. The exact numbers are not known off-campus students are like 10.
content.Infrastructure: The campus life is lot enjoyable. There are lot of space to spend time inside campus, like clubs. Architecture classes are quite good. You can have Wi-Fi access on laptops for free. A wide range of sports are available. Two canteens are available. Hostel and mess food is decent.

paragraphs: College of Engineering, Guindy (CEG) is a public engineering college located in Guindy, Chennai, India is affiliated to Anna University and was established in the year 1794. The institute offers more than 80 courses under the Undergraduate (UG), Postgraduate (PG) and Doctoral levels. All these courses are offered across 10 distinct streams amongst which the flagship streams are Engineering and IT & Software.

The institute offers BE and BTech programmes across multiple specialisations. Admission to these programmes is done through TNEA counselling. Given below is the eligibility criteria for the same is mentioned below:
10+2 from a recognised board with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as compulsory subjects

faqs.answer: College of Engineering, Anna University offers a large diversity of courses to students in various fields. College of Engineering Guindy admissions are held on the basis of both merit and entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as CEETA, GATE, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

faqs.question: Is College of Engineering Guindy hard to get?
faqs.answer: No, College of Engineering Guindy is not hard to get for hardworking students. All a student has to do is to prepare for the accepted entrance exams prior to the actual exam date. The accepted entrance exams areTANCET, GATE, and others. Students applying through GATE must prepare as per theGATE books. Students must follow all thepreperationtips for a successful admission to College of Engineering Guindy.

faqs.question: Does College of Engineering Guindy accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: No, College of Engineering Guindy does not accept the JEE Main entrance examination results for admission to various BTech course specialisations. Instead, the institute accepts the TNEA exam and its counselling process for admission.

faqs.question: Does students need to give an entrance exam for admission into the BTech course at College of Engineering, Anna University?
faqs.answer: College of Engineering, Anna University accepts the exam scores of the above listed exams:-Joint Entrance Exam (JEE).Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA).The score of the above mentioned exams are valid in the admission to the institution.

placement_data.title: College of Engineering Guindy Placement Overview 2022
paragraphs: The highest package and average package offered during CEG Guindy placements 2022 stood at INR 36.50 LPA and INR 6.93 LPA, respectively . Further, a total of 2,114 students were placed during College of Engineering Guindy placements 2022. Further, 27% of the total students received monthly stipend in between INR 50,000 and INR 100,000 during CEG Guindy Internships 2022. It is noted that the placement data mentioned above is released by CUIC center of Anna University that facilitates placement activities of the University department that includes College of Engineering, Guindy (CEG) along with Madras Institute of Technology, Alagappa College of Technology and School of Architecture and Planning.

faqs.question: How much salary can one expect after completing BSc from College of Engineering Guindy?
faqs.answer: CEG offers BSc courses with various specialisations namely Computer Science, Electronic media and Information Technology. Candidates with BSc in Computer Science and Information technology may have similar career scope and can pursue jobs such as web developers, mobile app developers, software engineers, system administrators and many more. Students of BSc in Electronic Media have different career prospects such as animator, graphic designer, news reporter and much more. Payouts for students may vary depending on the specialisations and individual skills and competency. Moreover, unlike general BSc courses, CEG MSc Integrated BSc course increases the chances of students grabbing higher paying jobs as companies may prefer candidates with PG degrees. hostel.description: The campus has 16 hostels, housing for 3500 students. Each hostel block has the requisite facilities to take care of student needs. Hostel messes, located in large centralized halls, serve hygienic and nutritious meals at regular intervals.

library.description: The total area of the library building is about 4122 sq.m. Around 10,157 registered users are in access to the library. labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Design Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Workstation Lab, Thin Client Lab, Surveying Lab, Cartography Lab, Photogrammetry Lab, Matlab, Advanced Computing Lab

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Anna University Chennai is good, and laboratories and libraries are available. They provide separate hostels for both boys and girls with free Wi-Fi. Hostel food is not bad. Average in taste. They give importance to sports as well as studies.

reviews.review_heading: I like hostel life more as college is strict.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was good enough to accommodate 2500 students including two colleges as we had two colleges under the same campus. Blocks were different but common facilities were shared be it library, canteens, sports ground, or the perpetual seminar halls. We had plenty at our campus.

reviews.review_heading: The pride in sharing the greatness of Asia's oldest college.
reviews.review_text: It is the best infrastructure available among the government colleges. The standards and the fees that we pay are very different. Though the fee is low. The infrastructure is very good. The greenery of the trees within the campus gives a good feeling to stay.

reviews.review_heading: My college is a 10 for those who prefer exposure rather than infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available, but the maintenance is poor. Wi-Fi is available, but it lags sometimes. Medical facilities are good enough, and the food is also good. But there is no proper maintenance of restrooms and infrastructure. The canteen still doesn't have Epay, but it is still in development. Cleanliness is at its worst on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with nice campus and social life.
reviews.review_text: The campus life is lot enjoyable. There are lot of space to spend time inside campus, like clubs. Architecture classes are quite good. You can have Wi-Fi access on laptops for free. A wide range of sports are available. Two canteens are available. Hostel and mess food is decent.

reviews.review_heading: I highly recommend, it is good.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available for laptops, and the library is really good with sufficient books and infrastructure. Hostel infrastructure is good, but the taste of mess food is a con, especially lunch. It is really a good college for sports, PPL in ball badminton, hockey, and throw ball. Health facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Anna University College, Chennai for M.E course.
reviews.review_text: The best quality of infrastructure and hostel facilities are also available. College department and hostel facilities include classrooms, lab, fast internet, garden, gym, lift elevator, etc. Canteen food is also good and many varieties of food are available.

reviews.review_heading: My experience of M.Sc. electronic media at Anna University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Anna University is good. University is well-managed for students. Labs are advanced. Library has more than 1 lakhs books and journals and full campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel is clean and well-managed. Mess has separate vegetarian and nonvegetarian food. So this is a better option for students who are vegetarian.

reviews.review_heading: Quality education with strong placements and affordable fees.
reviews.review_text: For my course, they provide good infrastructure with high-speed network in Wi-Fi and data. It provides well-organized labs and wonderful Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan library which has more than 40,000 books. The canteen provides food 3 times a day with good quality and good taste.

reviews.review_heading: Anna University is well satisfied with placements and exploration.
reviews.review_text: All the students of the college are provided with Anna Wi-Fi. The speed of the Wi-Fi is quite enough for academics. There is a health centre inside the campus, which is open to all students, faculty members, etc. There is a huge library inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Anna University, Chennai in the year 2025 admission in M.Tech course information.
reviews.review_text: This college provides the best facilities. They use high-quality infrastructure, products, and materials. This college provides facilities like classrooms, labs, benches, a library, fans, bathrooms, computers, etc. Facilities are available. This college has a canteen. Its food is very tasty and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Good exposure and campus.
reviews.review_text: The department has working labs and classrooms. There is a common library for all students within and outside the nearby campus. You cannot connect to data on your mobile within the department, but they will provide students with Wi-Fi that can be registered with your laptop. The quality of food is subpar in the international hostel. It is very repetitive. Housekeeping is prompt. The medical center closes by 5 pm, so in case of emergency, you have to visit Malar hospital nearby. Sports culture i...

reviews.review_heading: Vibrant Campus Life at CEG.
reviews.review_text: Even though our college is 200 years old, all the infrastructure is present and is very much available for students. But, we may not have a mobile network on the college campus. But there is Wi-Fi present all around the campus so it is very much helpful. Labs have very high facilities like the computers software required are very much pre-installed and ready to use. Hostels are affordable and manageable but still a bit of improvement is required.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, nothing negative as such.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure that is provided to us in our course is that we have access to Wi-Fi 24/7, labs, and also audio-video classrooms. The quality of the facilities that are provided to us in our hostel is really good, and the medical facilities are also really great.

reviews.review_heading: The best university with many facilities.
reviews.review_text: College facilities were good at our university. The infrastructure is very attractive. Our course provides Wi-Fi and a library that has books on all fields. The food quality in the mess is good. The hostel facilities are also good. Many sports events were conducted.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about College of Engineering, Anna University

likes.text: Companies like Amazon, Adobe, Standard Charterer, Trilogy Innovation, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., visit our college for placements.
Our college provides its best to encourage and enhance the placement facilities to the students.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Sukhmani Dental College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: One of the best college in the region with the lowest fee structure and best infrastructure.

content.Placements: Various healthcare companies visit college campus for job recruitment, after completion of the course you become eligible for opening your own clinic that you don't have to depend on anyone for recruitment. Various Pharmacovigilance companies also carries out placement drives.
content.Infrastructure: Fully Wi-Fi campus, Digital lecture theatre, One central Library along with it each department have their own departmental library, One general Hospital, one canteen, basketball court, playgrounds, seperate hostels for boys and girls, safe for girls as warden take care of them personally.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with placements, infrastructure, faculty members, and peace on the campus.

content.Placements: Every year, more than 100 students join our college. Excellent placements are provided in the army camp, BFHUS University, and many more. Top 10 students get direct entry into army camps as doctor's while the next 20 top students are given the privilege to serve the university and different institutions and hospitals joined with them.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24X7 on the campus including hostels. Classrooms and library are fully air-conditioned and have the latest technology of teaching. Professors are very supportive and understanding. Being near to highway we have an emergency multi-specialist hospital running 24X7.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This is a good dental college as far as education is concerned .

content.Placements: There is as such no placement option given to students from college campus . You yourself to struggle . In most of dental college is as such provision of placement . Aur if by an chance they themselves keep you in their own college pay is too less to be taken.
content.Infrastructure: Infra is good , well managed , latest in their region but not best ,if you check all dental college near by its condition is well maintained but again not the best but better option in comparision to others that what I would like to say . Proper dental chairs ,xrays ,labs etcc

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are good and make students good for practical work.

content.Placements: All students did well in their internship, and it makes them quite well in clinical works. Placements totally depend on our own interest. Our college helps us to manage with theory as well as practical part. Some students are also given placement in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Lecture theatres are fully air-conditioned, and the library has quite good books. Practical labs are well-furnished. Hostels are provided with Wi-Fi, and basketball and badminton courts are well-managed. Every year our college organises annual function and sports meet.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The placements are not a matter of concern in this course, the expertise in work is more important.

content.Placements: Can't say much about placements. The placements are not a matter of concern in this course, the expertise in work is more important.
content.Infrastructure: It has AC classrooms, a library with Wi-Fi. Labs are in fair condition. Canteen is a little bit expensive but overall good. Food is just normal. There is a basketball court in a very bad condition and just one volleyball net. It hot summer days it is very difficult to work in departments.
content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful. They teach using slides. Some teachers just play slides when in a hurry. Others teach with patience. But in the end, it is really haphazard. It's a college so, you are not spoon fed like school. The course is curriculum relevant. It's a dental college with average-sized OPD. The no. of patients are relatively less. Sometimes you have to find your own patients for your assignment.

admission_overview.title: Sri Sukhmani Dental College Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sri Sukhmani Dental College admissions are mainly entrance-based. The college offers a full-time Bachelor of Dental Surgery- BDS course at the UG level. The college reserves 50% seats under the management quota and the remaining 50% are offered through government quota. Students need to meet the admission requirements to get a seat at the college. Sri Sukhmani Dental College also known as SSDCH & Sri Sukhmani Dental College & Hospital, Mohali accepts applications online mainly. The college offers courses in affiliation with Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS). In the following sections, know all about the eligibility and admission process for Sri Sukhmani Dental College, Mohali.

eligibility_selection.title: Sri Sukhmani Dental College Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Sri Sukhmani Dental College course admissions are offered to eligible students who meet the preset admission criteria. The BDS course of the college is offered in full-time mode for a duration of five years. Students have to meet both the basic eligibility and clear the selection rounds to get a seat at the college. Students must also meet the age criteria. Applicants also have to be medically fit to be eligible. Interested students can check the table below to know about the general eligibility and selection criteria for Sri Sukhmani Dental College course: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Biotechnology & English as compulsory subjects with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for persons with Loco-motors disability of lower limbs and 40% for SC/ BC)

faqs.answer: No, you can't join Sri Sukhmani Dental College without entrance exam. The college selects strictly on the basis of NEET score. Hence, all applicants must appear for the exam. Seats are offered through counselling & admission committee.

admission_process.title: Sri Sukhmani Dental College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: TheSri Sukhmani Dental College admission processstarts with an eligibility check. Eligible students can proceed with the next steps. These include application, selection, counselling - if applicable, and admission confirmation. Students can complete this process mainly online. Interested students can see the steps below to complete theSri Sukhmani Dental College admissions:

Students have to first apply for NEET at the official site of NTA -neet.nta.nic.in.After that, students can apply at the college's site once the admissions start. The application has to be submitted with application fees and documents.

Students at Sri Sukhmani Dental College are shortlisted on an entrance basis. The college reserves 50 seats for management quota and 50 seats are offered to students apply through the government quota. The selection criteria for both quota is based on NEET score. See below to know more:
Selected students have to report for verification of documents and pay theSri Sukhmani Dental College admission feesto complete the process.

TheSri Sukhmani Dental College fee structuremay include components, such as tuition fees, library fees, lab fees, caution deposit, exam fees, and more. Some of these are charged only once while the rest are charged either yearly or semester-wise. Students can pay fees through Credit Card/ Debit Card/ UPI/ Cash, etc. Check below to know about theSri Sukhmani Dental College fees:
Note: This information is taken from official sources and is subject to change.

But, vacant seats of either category may get transferred to the other quota. Students are offered seats through entrance basis. reviews_list.review_title: Sanaka : a path of learning.

review_content.Placements: Almost 85% students got placed through the college campusing. The highest package offered was 12 LPA for the role of FRONTEND DEVELOPER by BYJU'S. Many others companies comes to offer jobs such as TCS, INFOSIS, WIPRO, etc. With a starting package of 4 LPA. A student can expect an average package of 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for the students such as free Wi-Fi, swimming pool, subject wise lab, projector classrooms, gyms, playgrounds, canteen, etc. The hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both AC & NON-AC rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. But there are several others options available such as mess and college canteen. There is 24*7 medical facility available for the students.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good campus with decent placement.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of B. Pharma students got placed. The highest package is 6 LPA, average salary is around 3.5 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiters included Cipla, Sun Pharma, and Dr. Reddy's. Internships in 60% cases, mainly in QA, QC, and production roles. It provides very good placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our B.Pharma department has smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and a rich library. Hostels are decent with good hygiene, mess food is average, and medical aid is available 24X7. There are ample sports and recreation facilities on campus, and also in very good condition.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A nice college campus with good faculty members, placement in 2024, facilities, studies, etc.

content.Placements: About 60% of students get placed. The salary package offered is 6 LPA. Government and private companies visited our campus. They provided great opportunities for all eligible students. Indian Army also recruits students here. Approximately 70% of students got internships at Tata Motors.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for students such as free Wi-Fi, a swimming pool, a subject-wise lab, projectors, classrooms, a gym, a playground, a canteen, etc. Hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. There are several other options available such as a mess and a college canteen. There is a 24/7 medical facility available for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Sanaka : a path of learning.

content.Placements: Almost 85% students got placed through the college campusing. The highest package offered was 12 LPA for the role of FRONTEND DEVELOPER by BYJU'S. Many others companies comes to offer jobs such as TCS, INFOSIS, WIPRO, etc. With a starting package of 4 LPA. A student can expect an average package of 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for the students such as free Wi-Fi, swimming pool, subject wise lab, projector classrooms, gyms, playgrounds, canteen, etc. The hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both AC & NON-AC rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. But there are several others options available such as mess and college canteen. There is 24*7 medical facility available for the students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: About 60% of students are placed. The salary package offered is 6 LPA. Government and private companies came to our campus. They provided great opportunities for all eligible students. Indian Army also recruits students here. Approximately 70% of students got internships at Tata Motors.
content.Infrastructure: Modern and digital classrooms, labs, and the library are good. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. The quality of food is average.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. Most of them have M.Tech. degrees from NITs. Their teaching quality is good and easy to understand. This course is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are very difficult to pass. 30% is the pass percentage.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in all aspects.

content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA. The average salary package offered is 2.50 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.70 LPA. Almost 50% of students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi, but students don't know the password. Sports and medical facilities are good, but the canteen facilities are not good.
content.Faculty: All teachers are highly educated and knowledgeable. Some teachers are very helpful. The pass percentage is 90%.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Sanaka Educational Trust’s Group of Institutions has separate hostels for boys and girls. The food stuff served at the hostels has been acclaimed to be of a very high standard. Special food items are served on special occasions and a grand feast is arranged at the end of every month. The hotels have indoor sports facilities including table tennis, carom, volley ball, badminton, and multi-gym while the common rooms are provided with cable connection. Hostels are also equipped with broadband internet facilities and communication centers with STD/ISD and FAX services operating round the clock cater to the students' personal requirements

library.description: Sanaka Educational Trust’s Group of Institutions has a central library with a huge collection of technical books, periodicals, video films, Indian standards, general magazines and other publications related to each and every aspect of engineering and its related subjects.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Football, Cricket, Table Tennis, Volleyball, Badminton, Swimming

reviews.review_heading: Good campus with decent placement.
reviews.review_text: Our B.Pharma department has smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and a rich library. Hostels are decent with good hygiene, mess food is average, and medical aid is available 24X7. There are ample sports and recreation facilities on campus, and also in very good condition.

reviews.review_heading: A nice college campus with good faculty members, placement in 2024, facilities, studies, etc.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for students such as free Wi-Fi, a swimming pool, a subject-wise lab, projectors, classrooms, a gym, a playground, a canteen, etc. Hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. There are several other options available such as a mess and a college canteen. There is a 24/7 medical facility available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Sanaka : a path of learning.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for the students such as free Wi-Fi, swimming pool, subject wise lab, projector classrooms, gyms, playgrounds, canteen, etc. The hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both AC & NON-AC rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. But there are several others options available such as mess and college canteen. There is 24*7 medical facility available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Modern and digital classrooms, labs, and the library are good. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. The quality of food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, but students don't know the password. Sports and medical facilities are good, but the canteen facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: The fee structure is cheap with concerning other colleges with good academics.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a free Wi-Fi zone but it is fully not true, work is going on it. Our laboratories are good but the computers are not modified. Classrooms are good and it has single sit benches. Our library is good and it is under AICTE. There are many books in the library. The food served in the canteen is good. Hospital is also available. It has a playground, and there are two coaches for football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college with high rate of placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a good and well-maintained laboratory for B.Pharma students. Library is quite huge. Food quality is awesome and cricket can be played in sports. I love our college although never went because of the corona.

reviews.review_heading: I would love to recommend my juniors to join this beautiful college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is really good, and everything is quite good. Most of the time, I spend time in libraries. There are many books in our library, which are not only subjective but also knowledgeable books. The facilities in the hostel and college are really good, with a canteen and medical support.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent faculty members and a lush green campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure with a lot of areas covered with lush green trees. The canteen has average quality food but all other facilities are excellent. Wardens are available 24X7 for both boys as well as girls hostels. Wi-Fi and electricity facilities are available in the hostel all the time.

reviews.review_heading: SETGOI is a college of our dreams.
reviews.review_text: For this course, we have very advanced labs with hi-tech instruments. Classrooms are huge and there are a large number of books in the library. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. As this is a private college, the hostel costs are a little bit high, but there are big rooms. The canteen serves tasty foods at a reasonable price. We have huge playgrounds to play cricket and many others games.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and infrastructure are average, but faculty members and course curriculum are good.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is unhygienic without any proper food management. Prices are too high, and the quality is also not that good. Canteen seats are very low comparing to students. You have to be very fast or wait long to get a seat. Sometimes we miss our classes for this problem. Medical facilities are very good, and students are always under the supervision of great doctors. Our college has its own hospital, so students get the best medical supervision here.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, and Wi-Fi is available in the campus ground. Classrooms are good, and the library is very good. The whole college is clean. Our college campus has a small garden and swimming pool. Computer labs are also big, and each classroom has 100 computers. Our college canteen is good, and our college also has a hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Your life will get changed after meeting new friends here.
reviews.review_text: Our college has average classroom facilities and doesn't have smart classrooms. There are no properly organised laboratories, and management is the worst. Wi-Fi facility is not provided, and classrooms are dirty. The collection of books available in the library is limited, but gradually our college management is developing its infrastructure. Overall, I have a good experience here.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average in infrastructure and not good in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Classrooms were good, but labs had very less equipment, so students work on the same equipment. I wasn't staying in the hostel, but I have heard in the first year that most of the students used to stay at the college hostel. After that, 10-15% of them stay only in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Try this college. Teachers are well educated and experienced.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, free Wi-Fi is provided by the college in the campus as well as in the hostel. Hostel is spacious and has the option of both AC and non AC. The quality of food in the canteen is good. Doctor is available in the campus 24*7 and College has its own playground.

The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    The seats availability for offered courses at Sri Padmavathi School Of Pharmacy goes up to 185. Courses offerred by Sri Padmavathi School Of Pharmacy are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE.
faqs.question: What is the overall intake at Sri Padmavathi School Of Pharmacy for all courses together?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sri Padmavathi School Of Pharmacy offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Sri Padmavathi School Of Pharmacy offers M.Pharma. The fees for Sri Padmavathi School Of Pharmacy courses range between INR 1,20,000 to 3,90,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college with really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: At least 30% of students get job offer letters during campus placements. Packages are even good for freshers. Many students opt for industrial purposes rather than hospitals. Overall, it is a very good college in giving better careers to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel are very good comparatively. Food is hygienic, and all rooms are cleaned every day. The warden takes care of students. individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College with good faculty members and discipline.

content.Placements: Around 30 to 40% of the students get placed in our college every year. Pharmacovigilance and industrial side and hospital clinical pharmacist are done if the roles offered in our college. They get a license for pharmacy practice. Packages start from 3 LPA according to the role.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious. Hostel has good infrastructure. The food in the mess is good when compared to other hostels. There is a very good library in our college. Many departments and placement cells are present in Sri Padmavathi School Of Pharmacy.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college with really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: At least 30% of students get job offer letters during campus placements. Packages are even good for freshers. Many students opt for industrial purposes rather than hospitals. Overall, it is a very good college in giving better careers to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel are very good comparatively. Food is hygienic, and all rooms are cleaned every day. The warden takes care of students. Safety in the hostel is of next level. I would recommend this hostel rather than being in a PG because of its security and food hygiene.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely love the college including the garden, library and the faculty, every thing is superb.

content.Infrastructure: In Tirupati, my college is the best. It’s good only for the pharmacy department and not for other courses like MPC or BIPC. individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm so proud of this college.

content.Placements: Students were placed in my course. 30 seats were there for Pharma.D. 10 seats for Pharma.D. The highest package is 2,40000, lowest is 95000and the average package is 60000. Ruia hospital is thee recruiting company. College doesn't provide internship and they will give 1yr mandatory internship. Specialist in pharmacology pharmacy practice and pharmaceutical analysis are the top roles offered. .
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connection is good according to the signals. Labs are so good 3hr practice in lab every day is given. Library facilities are provided twice a week, but we can attend everyday based on our interest, library time is 9.45 AM To 5.30 PM. Food compared with outside hostel in mess is good. Don't have expectations on sports and games.
